record.field: Firecrawl turns any website into clean, LLM-ready data through a single API for scraping, crawling, and searching the web.

Firecrawl turns any website into clean, LLM-ready data through a single API for scraping, crawling, and searching the web.

It takes a URL and returns clean Markdown, HTML, screenshots, or structured JSON, and can crawl every accessible subpage of a site to deliver consistent data for each one. Built for developers and AI applications that need reliable web content for retrieval, indexing, and extraction pipelines, it handles dynamic JavaScript pages, page interactions, and bulk processing. The self-hosted edition runs on Docker with PostgreSQL and Redis, giving teams full control over where their data is processed.

Key features
  • Scrape any URL into Markdown, HTML, screenshots, or structured JSON
  • Crawl entire sites and map all discoverable URLs
  • Renders dynamic JavaScript pages and executes page actions (click, scroll, type)
  • Batch scraping and queue-based job management for processing at scale
  • Optional AI-powered extraction into structured schemas via an LLM (OpenAI, Ollama)
  • Official SDKs for Python, Node.js, Go, Rust, Java, and Elixir
Best for

Developers, data engineers, and AI teams building RAG pipelines, search indexes, or data extraction workflows that need clean, structured web content. Self-hosting suits organizations with strict data-residency or security requirements that need scraping to stay inside their own infrastructure.
